name: Captain America
description: Steven Grant Rogers was a frail young man from Brooklyn who volunteered for the Super-Soldier program during World War II, emerging as the peak of human physical perfection. Frozen in Arctic ice for decades, he awoke in the modern age to lead the Avengers. Rogers is the moral compass of the Marvel Universe, incorruptible, self-sacrificing, and unwilling to compromise his principles even when facing impossible odds. His vibranium shield and tactical genius make him one of the greatest leaders in Marvel history.
